Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class ChatterEmailsMDSettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.ChatterEmailsMDSettings2
public class ChatterEmailsMDSettings2 extends SObject

Java class for ChatterEmailsMDSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ChatterEmailsMDSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsChatterDigestEmailsApiOnlyEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsChatterEmailAttachmentEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCollaborationEmailEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDisplayAppDownloadBadgesEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsEmailReplyToChatterEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsEmailToChatterEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ChatterEmailsMDSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NoQnOwnNotifyOnCaseCmt" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NoQnOwnNotifyOnRep" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NoQnSubNotifyOnBestR" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NoQnSubNotifyOnRep" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
